title: Refund Policy
body: Refunds are available for returns made within 30 days. Items must be unopened and in original packaging.

title: Shipping Policy
body: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Expedited shipping is 2-3 business days.

title: Privacy Policy
body: We never share personal information without consent. Data is protected with industry standard encryption.

title: Warranty Policy
body: Items include a 1-year limited warranty covering manufacturer defects.

title: Cancellation Policy
body: Cancellations are accepted within 12 hours of order placement for full refund.

title: Accessibility Policy
body: Our website is designed to support WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards.
